title: The Boys, Yuni and Chika
overview: Kimichika and Yuni were childhood friends, but Kimichika moved away when they were still in kindergarten. Yuni is ecstatic to hear that Kimichika is moving back after eight years, but when they are reunited, Kimichika had completely changed.

title: The Best and Worst Playmaker
overview: The boys get ready for their first tournament and their hopes are high. But Yuni starts to get nervous during the game and panics. Haijima manages to salvage the game, but his teammates now look at him differently.

title: A Dog's Perspective and a Giraffe's Perspective
overview: Yuni and Kimichika now go to Seiin High School, but haven't really talked to each other since their last middle school tournament. Oda, Seiin's volleyball team captain, tries to get Kimichika to join the team.

title: Higher, Faster, Stronger
overview: Kimichika leaves Yuni out of the practice exercises the rest of the team is doing and Seiin finally plays at the Fall Tournament.

title: Stand By Me
overview: Kimichika and Yuni head to Tokyo to Kimichika's old school so he can face his past. But once they get there, Kimichika finds out the shocking truth...

title: The Laughing King and Crybaby Jack
overview: Fukuho Tech has been the representatives for Fukui at the Inter-High and Spring Tournament for seven years. But now, they hear that the team at Seiin might give them a run for their money.

title: The Ruling Hero of the Court
overview: Seiin plays their practice match against Fukuho. Haijima has a suggestion for the prefectural qualifiers that throws the whole team for a loop.

title: Yuni and Chika Re-enter the Battle
overview: Seiin starts their first match in the tournament but are instantly thrown off when Oda takes himself out of the starting lineup. Will they be able to get back on their feet?

title: The Unbeaten and the Dark Horse
overview: Seiin and Fukuho both prepare for their upcoming match to decide which team will represent Fukui at the Spring Tournament, and Subaru gets some unexpected news from his doctor...

title: The Hero and the Genius 1
overview: Seiin and Fukuho finally face off to see who'll go to the nationals to represent Fukui. Even without Ochi at their side, Fukuho starts off strong.

title: The Hero and the Genius 2
overview: The battle between Seiin and Fukuho heats up! Who will come out victorious?

title: Runway
overview: Seiin is going to head to the Spring Tournament, but what lies ahead for them beyond that?
